# Support

How to get help with this repository.

## Asking a question or reporting a problem

- **Bug in the framework's docs, automation, or CI** — use the [Bug report template](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug-defect.yml).
- **Support question, product signal, or inbound user feedback** — use the [Support intake template](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/support-intake.yml). It will be triaged via the [support and improvement loop](../docs/product-support-and-improvement-loop.md).
- **Proposing a change to the framework itself** — use the [Framework change template](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/framework-change.yml). Read the [continuity charter](../docs/framework-continuity-and-memory.md) first.
- **Security vulnerability** — do **NOT** open a public issue. Use the repository's **Security** tab to file a private security advisory. See [`SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md).

## Before you open an issue

- Check the [README](../README.md) and the [framework continuity charter](../docs/framework-continuity-and-memory.md) for the relevant entry point.
- Skim the [runbooks index](../docs/runbooks/README.md) — your question may already be answered by a runbook.
- Search existing issues before filing a new one.

## Response expectations

This is a small framework repository maintained by the owner listed in `.github/CODEOWNERS`. Responses are best-effort and may take several days. Security reports are prioritized over general support.
